The {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal Box|orange}} is a reward for many events and it contains the following:
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Quantum Gel, +2k}}

This heavy box contains the precious Singularity Crystal. It allows the user to observe the nebula from an even closer place!

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
